svg.title: Case-knowledge request lifecycle
svg.desc: Detailed flow showing user request through edge, ABAC authorization, AgentCore reasoning loop with three workflow branches, internal and external retrieval, generation with guardrails, and audit writeback.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about IAM Identity Center federated to the firm IdP')
sendPrompt('How does CloudFront and the React frontend handle multi-modal viewers?')
sendPrompt('What does API Gateway validate before routing?')
sendPrompt('How does Verified Permissions evaluate Cedar policies for ABAC?')
g.text: ABAC: role, matter team, conflicts, privilege, AEO, audience

svg.text: If denied: return 403, write audit, end

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does AgentCore Runtime classify workflow intent?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the case lookup workflow with supporting authority')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the case similarity workflow for cold start')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the cold-start drafting workflow with precedent')
sendPrompt('How does Bedrock KB do hybrid retrieval with ABAC metadata filters?')
sendPrompt('How does the rerank step improve retrieval precision?')
sendPrompt('How does AgentCore Gateway expose the four MCP servers with OAuth on-behalf-of?')
sendPrompt('How are Bedrock Guardrails configured for legal content?')
g.text: Sonnet or Opus, citation enforced, grounding check

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does citation post-validation prevent fabricated citations?')
g.text: Every cite traces to real source

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does response streaming work with SSE?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the DynamoDB sessions and audit tables?')
sendPrompt('How does CloudWatch capture traces, metrics, and Bedrock invocation logs?')
